prompt: Medieval European castle interior with knights preparing armor, long tapestries
prompt_refined: A grand hall within a medieval European castle interior, illuminated by torchlight. Several knights are gathered, actively preparing their armor; some are donning polished plate armor, while others meticulously clean helmets and gauntlets. Long, richly detailed tapestries depicting historical or mythological scenes adorn the rough stone walls.
objects: Medieval European castle grand hall interior
Polished plate armor (being donned by knights)
